extension.summary: Kodi network control for Debian and Raspberry Pi 5
Ovladani site v Kodi pro Debian a Raspberry Pi 5
extension.description: Browse nearby Wi-Fi networks, connect and disconnect, and manage IP configuration through a helper service.
Prochazejte Wi-Fi site, pripojujte a odpojujte se a spravujte IP konfiguraci pres pomocnou sluzbu.
